name: Headbutt
desc: A melee attack that inflicts Stun.

name: HeadButt2
desc:
A melee attack that inflicts Stun.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Throw Scrap
desc: Give +3 [img:shield] to a unit or spawn a scrap pickup on an empty tile.

name: ThrowShield2
desc: Give +3 [img:shield] to units in an area and spawn scrap pickups on the empty tiles in that area.

name: Chew Cud
desc: Heal yourself.

name: ChewCud2
desc: Heal yourself more.

name: Ass Blast
desc: Knock back units in an area near you 4 tiles.

name: AssBlast2
desc: Knock back units in a larger area near you 10 tiles.

name: Chew
desc: A melee attack with Lifesteal.

name: Chew2
desc: A melee attack with Lifesteal that inflicts Bleed 2 and ignores shield.

name: Batter Up
desc: Knock a unit back 10 tiles.

name: BatterUp2
desc: Knock a unit back 10 tiles with Chain Knockback.

name: Backbreaker
desc: A melee attack that Immobilizes.

name: BackBreaker2
desc: A melee attack that Immobilizes and gives -2 [img:spd].

name: Suplex
desc: Grab a unit in front of you and slam it into the tile behind you.

name: Suplex2
desc: Grab a unit in front of you and slam it into the tile behind you, inflicting Bruise 3 and Immobile.

name: Intimidate
desc: Inflict Fear on an adjacent unit.

name: Intimidate2
desc: Inflict Fear on a unit up to five tiles away.

name: Toss
desc: Throw an adjacent unit to an open tile.

name: Toss2
desc: Throw an adjacent unit to a tile, dealing bonus damage if it collides with something.

name: Toss
desc:
Throw an adjacent unit to an open tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: BonusToss2
desc:
Throw an adjacent unit to a tile, dealing bonus damage if it collides with something.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Toss
desc:
Throw your crippled friend to any tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Belly Flop
desc: Jump to a tile and Immobilize anything you land on.

name: BellyFlop2
desc: Jump to a tile and Immobilize units in an area.

name: Jump
desc: Jump to a tile and damage what you land on.

name: Jump
desc: Jump to a tile and damage what you land on.

name: Trample Dash
desc: Dash forward with Trample, then spawn a rock.

name: TankTrample2
desc: Dash forward with Trample, then spawn a rock. Deals more damage and has a 20% chance to inflict Stun.

name: Swap
desc: Swap positions with any ally.

name: TankSwap2
desc: Swap positions with any unit.

name: To the Rescue!
desc: Jump to a tile adjacent to an ally. Damage and displace any units you land on.

name: ToTheRescue2
desc: Jump to a tile adjacent to an ally. Damage and displace any units you land on, or are adjacent to.

name: Tantrum
desc: Hit all adjacent units, then spawn a rock.

name: TankTantrum2
desc: Hit all adjacent and diagonally adjacent units, then spawn a rock.

name: Earthquake
desc:
Deal damage in a cone with a 10% chance to Petrify. Has a chance to spawn rocks.
[s:.7](This spell spawns rocks.)[/s]

name: Earthquake2
desc:
Deal more damage in a cone with a 20% chance to Petrify. Has a chance to spawn rocks.
[s:.7](This spell spawns rocks.)[/s]

name: Rock Toss
desc: Throw a rock with a 10% chance to Stun.

name: RockToss2
desc: Throw a rock with a 33% chance to Stun.

name: Barbed Wire
desc:
Give a unit +5 Thorns until your next turn.
[s:.7](You can target yourself.)[/s]

name: Barbed Wire
desc:
Give a unit or object +5 Thorns until your next turn.
[s:.7](You can target yourself.)[/s]

name: Goad
desc: Force an enemy to move towards you.

name: DrawAttention2
desc:
Force an enemy anywhere to move towards you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Bowl Over
desc: Trample over one tile diagonally.

name: BowlOver2
desc: Trample over two tiles diagonally with a 10% chance to inflict Stun.

name: Clap
desc: Knock 2 enemies in front of you together.

name: Clap2
desc: Knock 2 enemies in front of you together with +2 knockback damage.

name: Rock Song
desc: Levitate all rocks. They will automatically fling towards enemies that end movement in line with them.

name: TankRockSong2
desc:
Levitate all rocks. They will automatically fling towards enemies that end movement in line with them.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Rock Crusher
desc: Jump on top of a rock, exploding it. Deal damage and knock back all adjacent units.

name: RockCrusher2
desc: Jump on top of a rock, exploding it. Deal high damage and knock back all adjacent units.

name: Body Guard
desc: The next time an ally is targeted by an enemy, switch places with that ally.

name: BodyGuard2
desc: The next time an ally is targeted by an enemy, switch places with that ally and gain +4 [img:shield].

name: Swap
desc: {he} swap

name: Swap
desc: {he} swap

name: Gore
desc: Dash 3 tiles, damage, inflict Bruise and throw what you hit towards your original tile.

name: Gore2
desc: Dash 10 tiles, damage, inflict Bruise and throw what you hit towards your original tile.

name: Rock Blast
desc: Shoot a rock forward.

name: RockBlast2
desc:
Shoot a rock forward with Chain Knockback.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Rock Tomb
desc: Damage and Petrify a unit within 3 tiles of you.

name: RockTomb2
desc:
Damage and Petrify a unit within 5 tiles of you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Grab
desc: Pull a unit within 2 tiles towards you, knocking it into you.

name: BearHug2
desc: Pull a unit within 4 tiles towards you, knocking it into you and inflicting Grappled.

name: Fissure
desc: Pull all units in a wide line towards the center of that line. This has a 10% chance to Petrify.

name: Fissure2
desc: Pull all units in a wide line towards the center of that line. This has a 15% chance to Petrify and spawns rocks.

name: Big Rock
desc: Drop a boulder on an adjacent tile, damaging and displacing units it lands on.

name: BigRock2
desc: Drop a boulder on an adjacent tile, damaging, Stunning and displacing units it lands on.

name: Flip Flop
desc:
Jump up to 3 tiles away, damage units you land on, then gain -1 [img:spd].
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost is equal to your [img:spd].
At 0 [img:spd], this spell is Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: FlipFlop2
desc:
Jump up to 4 tiles away, damage units you land on, then gain -1 [img:spd].
If your [img:spd] is 0, this has increased range and damage.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost is equal to your [img:spd].
At 0 [img:spd], this spell is Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Lunge
desc:
Dash forward one tile and attack with Knockback.
This spell uses up your movement action.

name: Lunge2
desc:
Dash forward one tile, attack with Knockback and inflict Stun.
This spell uses up your movement action.

name: Nudge
desc:
Push a unit back 1 tile.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana the first time it's used each turn.)[/s]

name: Nudge2
desc:
Push a unit back 10 tiles.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana the first time it's used each turn.)[/s]

name: Stone Breath
desc: Inflict Petrify on the first unit in a line.

name: StoneGaze2
desc:
Inflict Petrify and Knockback on the first unit in a line.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Gorgon Glare
desc: Inflict Petrify on all units in your line of sight.

name: Medusa2
desc:
Inflict Petrify on all units in your line of sight.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Anchor
desc: Gain +4 Brace until the next time you move.

name: Anchor2
desc:
Gain +4 Brace until the next time you move.
Bonus Passive: Knockback immunity.

name: Eat Rock
desc: Eat a rock to gain +5 [img:shield] and +1 [img:str].

name: Eat Rock
desc: Eat a rock to gain +5 [img:shield] and All Stats Up.

name: Plant Your Feet
desc:
Gain +5 [img:shield] and -1 [img:spd]. 
If you are at 0 [img:spd], instead cleanse all of your debuffs.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: PlantFeet2
desc:
Gain +6 [img:shield] and -1 [img:spd].
If you are at 0 [img:spd], instead cleanse all of your debuffs and gain All Stats Up.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Iron Head
desc: Dash forward up to 3 tiles, gain +4 [img:shield] then damage and knock back adjacent units.

name: IronHead2
desc: Dash forward up to 10 tiles, gain +4 [img:shield] then damage and knock back adjacent units with +5 knockback damage.

name: Gang Up
desc: Toss a unit to an empty tile within 3 tiles of you, then your allies attack it if they can.

name: GangUp2
desc: Toss a unit to an empty tile within 6 tiles of you and inflict Bruise, then your allies attack it if they can.

name: Aftershock
desc: All units on dirt tiles get tossed to random nearby tiles and take damage when they land.

name: Aftershock2
desc:
All units on dirt tiles get tossed to random tiles and take damage when they land.
Bonus Passive: All of your spells have Earth element.

name: Steelskin
desc: Gain +99 Brace until your next turn, then disable this spell until you take a total of 25 damage.

name: SteelSkin2
desc: Gain +99 Brace until your next turn, then disable this spell until you take a total of 15 damage.

name: Fault Line
desc: Fling all units in a straight line onto nearby tiles.

name: FaultLine2
desc: Fling all units in a straight line onto nearby tiles, dealing more damage.

name: Demolish
desc: Turn a tile into a dirt tile, smashing any inanimate objects into rocks.

name: Demolish2
desc: Turn 3 tiles into dirt tiles, smashing any inanimate objects into rocks.

name: Cat-A-Pult!
desc:
Get flung to a tile and deal damage to anything you land on.
This doesn't use up your movement action.

name: CatapultJump2
desc:
Get flung to a tile and deal damage to anything you land on.
This doesn't use up your movement action.

name: Push Through
desc: Trample over 2 tiles in a straight line destroying any inanimate objects.

name: PushThrough2
desc: Trample over 4 tiles in a straight line destroying any inanimate objects and inflicting Bruise 1 on units you trample.

name: Pincushion
desc:
Gain +3 Thorns. 
This spell uses up your movement action.

name: Spur2
desc:
Gain +3 Thorns and +1 Brace.
This spell uses up your movement action.

name: Supper
desc:
Heal 15 HP and gain -2 [img:spd].
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Supper2
desc:
Heal 15 HP, gain -2 [img:spd] and +5 Health Regeneration.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Full Force
desc: Deal damage equal to your [img:con] and inflict Stun. Also stuns yourself.

name: FullForce2
desc: Deal damage equal to your [img:con] and inflict Stun and Bruise 4. Also stuns yourself.

name: Sandstorm
desc:
Start a sandstorm.
(Sandstorm deals 1 damage to all units at the end of round.)
If a sandstorm was already active, increase its damage by 1.

name: Sandstorm2
desc:
Start a sandstorm.
(Sandstorm deals 1 damage to all units at the end of round.)
If a sandstorm was already active, increase its damage by 1.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn.)[/s]

name: Thicken
desc: Gain +1 knockback damage and +1 knockback range until the end of the turn.

name: Thicken2
desc:
Gain +1 [img:con].
Gain +1 knockback damage and +1 knockback range until the end of the turn.
